Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************************

 Displayed symmetric monoidal categories

 In this file, we define the notion of a symmetric displayed monoidal category and show how the total monoidal category is symmetric.

Table of contents:
1. DisplayedBraided:
   - Definition of displayed braiding [disp_braiding]
   - Construction of braiding on the total category [total_braiding]
2. DisplayedSymmetric:
   - Definition of displayed symmetric [disp_symmetric]
   - Construction of symmetry on the total category [total_symmetric]
   - Proof of redundancy in the axioms of the braiding when considering a symmetric braiding.
     The redundant set of axioms is given in [disp_symm_braiding_laws].
     The proof that we get a braiding [make_disp_symmetric].
3. Projection:
   - Proof that the forgetful functor, from the total to the base category, is symmetric [projection_is_symmetric]
4. LocallyPropositional:
   - A make braiding constructor for locally propositional displayed categories;
     i.e., only the braiding and (inverse) has to be provided [make_disp_laws_braiding_locally_propositional].
   - A make symmetric constructor for locally propositional displayed categories [make_disp_symmetric_locally_propositional]
5. InvertibleMorphismsBraiding
   - A make braiding constructor for locally invertible displayed categories [make_disp_braiding_locally_groupoidal]
6. InvertibleMorphismsSymmetric
   - A make symmetric constructor for locally invertible displayed categories [make_disp_symmetric_locally_groupoidal]

 *********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Projection.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.Monoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TotalMonoidal.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TransportLemmas.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

Import BifunctorNotations.
Import MonoidalNotations.
Import DisplayedBifunctorNotations.
Import DisplayedMonoidalNotations.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
ff ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh
→ ff ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg =
  transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
    (p @
     maponpaths
       (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧, f · i)
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g))
    hh

gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2

→ ff ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg =

       (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧, f · i)
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g))
    hh

hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
q: ff ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh
ff ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧, f · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
q: ff ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧, f · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g))
  (transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
q: ff ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh
?t1 = transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2)) p hh

    exact q.

zz2: D z2

gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧

yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2

gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧, f · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g))
  (ff ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg)

    apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
ff ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg =
ff ;; transportf
        (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g)
        (id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg =
transportf
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g)
  (id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg)


  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg =
transportf
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g)
  (id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧
g: C ⟦ z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x, y ⊗_{ M} z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1
gg: zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx -->[ h] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz2
p: h = f · identity y ⊗^{ M} g
transportb
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (pr1 DM y z2 yy zz2))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y g)
  (yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) =
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg

  apply pathsinv0, disp_tensor_with_id_on_left.
Qed.


C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
→ ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg =
  transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
    (p @
     maponpaths
       (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
    hh


C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
→ ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg =
  transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
    (p @
     maponpaths
       (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
    hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (p @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  hh

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  (transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
?t1 = transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh

    exact q.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg)

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M

g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧

zz2: D z2

hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2)
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, y ⊗_{ M} z1 ⟧, i · g)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg)

    apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker.
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; gg =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1) ;; gg

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} id_disp zz1)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
x, y, z1, z2: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
h: C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} z1, z2 ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz1: D z1
zz2: D z2
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ g] zz2
hh: xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1 -->[ h] zz2
p: h = f ⊗^{ M} identity z1 · g
q: ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz1 ;; gg =
transportf (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz1) zz2) p hh
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x z1 xx zz1) (pr1 DM y z1 yy zz1))
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z1 f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1) =
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz1 ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} id_disp zz1

  apply pathsinv0, disp_tensor_with_id_on_right.
Qed.

Section DisplayedBraided.

  Context
    {C : category}
    {D : disp_cat C}
    {M : monoidal C}
    (DM : disp_monoidal D M).

  Definition disp_braiding_data
    (B : braiding_data M) : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
      xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy -->[B x y] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx.

  Definition total_braiding_data
    {B : braiding_data M} (DB : disp_braiding_data B)
    : braiding_data (total_monoidal DM)
    := λ x y, _ ,, DB _ _ (pr2 x) (pr2 y).

  Section BraidingLaws.

    Context
      {B : braiding M}
        (DB : disp_braiding_data (monoidal_braiding_data B))
        (DBinv : disp_braiding_data (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)).

    Definition disp_braiding_law_naturality_left : UU
      := ∏ (x y1 y2 : C)
          (xx : D x) (yy1 : D y1) (yy2 : D y2)
          (g : C⟦y1,y2⟧) gg,
        transportf _ (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g)
          (DB x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)
        = xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; DB x y2 xx yy2.

    Definition disp_braiding_law_naturality_right : UU
      := ∏ (x1 x2 y : C)
          (xx1 : D x1) (xx2 : D x2) (yy : D y)
          (f : C⟦x1,x2⟧) ff,
    transportf _ (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
      (DB x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff)
    = ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; DB x2 y xx2 yy.

    Definition disp_braiding_law_naturality
      : UU
      := disp_braiding_law_naturality_left × disp_braiding_law_naturality_right.

    Definition disp_braiding_iso
      : UU
      := ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
        is_disp_inverse (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y) (DB _ _ xx yy) (DBinv _ _ yy xx).

    Definition disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 : UU
      := ∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (zz : D z),
        transportf _ ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
          (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}
           ;; DB x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
        = DB x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz
          ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz}
          ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} DB x z xx zz.

    Definition disp_braiding_law_hexagon2 : UU
      := ∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (zz : D z),
         transportf _ ((pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
           (dαinv^{DM}_{xx, yy, zz}
            ;; DB (x ⊗_{M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{DM} yy) zz
            ;; dαinv^{DM}_{zz, xx, yy})
         = xx ⊗⊗^{DM}_{l} DB y z yy zz
           ;; dαinv^{DM}_{xx, zz, yy}
           ;; DB x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{DM}_{r} yy.

    Definition disp_braiding_law_hexagon : UU
      := disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 × disp_braiding_law_hexagon2.

    Definition disp_braiding_laws
      : UU
      := disp_braiding_law_naturality
         × disp_braiding_iso
         × disp_braiding_law_hexagon.

  End BraidingLaws.

  Definition disp_braiding
    (B : braiding M) : UU
    := ∑ (DB : disp_braiding_data (monoidal_braiding_data B))
         (DBinv : disp_braiding_data (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)),
      disp_braiding_laws DB DBinv.

  Definition disp_braiding_to_braiding
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_data (monoidal_braiding_data B)
    := pr1 DB.

  Definition disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_data (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
    := pr12 DB.

  Definition disp_braiding_to_braiding_laws
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_laws (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB)
    := pr22 DB.

  Definition disp_braiding_to_naturality
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_law_naturality (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    := pr1 (disp_braiding_to_braiding_laws DB).

  Definition disp_braiding_to_naturality_left
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_law_naturality_left (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    := pr1 (disp_braiding_to_naturality DB).

  Definition disp_braiding_to_naturality_right
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_law_naturality_right (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    := pr2 (disp_braiding_to_naturality DB).

  Definition disp_braiding_to_inverses
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_iso (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB)
    := pr12 (disp_braiding_to_braiding_laws DB).

  Definition disp_braiding_to_hexagon
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_law_hexagon (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    := pr22 (disp_braiding_to_braiding_laws DB).

  Definition disp_braiding_to_hexagon1
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    := pr1 (disp_braiding_to_hexagon DB).

  Definition disp_braiding_to_hexagon2
    {B : braiding M}
    (DB : disp_braiding B)
    : disp_braiding_law_hexagon2 (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    := pr2 (disp_braiding_to_hexagon DB).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality_left
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality_left
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y1, y2: total_category D
g: total_category D ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
  y1 · g ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} x =
x ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} g
· total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
    y2

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y1, y2: total_category D
g: total_category D ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
pr1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x y1 · g ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} x) =
pr1
  (x ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} g
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y2)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y1, y2: total_category D
g: total_category D ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y1))
     (pr2 (y2 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x))) ?p
  (pr2
     (total_braiding_data
        (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y1
      · g ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} x)) =
pr2
  (x ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} g
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y1, y2: total_category D
g: total_category D ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
pr1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x y1 · g ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} x) =
pr1
  (x ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} g
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y2)
 apply monoidal_braiding_naturality_left.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y1, y2: total_category D
g: total_category D ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y1))
     (pr2 (y2 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x)))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B (pr1 x)
     (pr1 y1) (pr1 y2) (pr1 g))
  (pr2
     (total_braiding_data
        (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y1
      · g ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} x)) =
pr2
  (x ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} g
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y2)
 apply disp_braiding_to_naturality_left.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality_right
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality_right
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x1, x2, y: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x1
  y · y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} f =
f ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y
· total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    x2 y

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x1, x2, y: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
pr1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x1 y · y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} f) =
pr1
  (f ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x2 y)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x1, x2, y: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 (x1 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y))
     (pr2 (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x2))) ?p
  (pr2
     (total_braiding_data
        (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x1 y
      · y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} f)) =
pr2
  (f ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x2 y)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x1, x2, y: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
pr1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x1 y · y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} f) =
pr1
  (f ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x2 y)
 apply monoidal_braiding_naturality_right.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x1, x2, y: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 (x1 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y))
     (pr2 (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x2)))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B (pr1 x1)
     (pr1 x2) (pr1 y) (pr1 f))
  (pr2
     (total_braiding_data
        (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x1 y
      · y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} f)) =
pr2
  (f ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x2 y)
 apply disp_braiding_to_naturality_right.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_naturality_right
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

    exact (total_braiding_naturality_right DB).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_iso
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))
  (total_braiding_data
     (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_iso
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))
  (total_braiding_data
     (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
is_inverse_in_precat
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     (x,, xx) (y,, yy))
  (total_braiding_data
     (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB) (y,, yy)
     (x,, xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x: C
xx: D x
y: C
yy: D y
i:= is_z_iso_total
  (total_braiding_data
     (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) (x,, xx)
     (y,, yy))
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B y x,,
   monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y
   :
   is_z_isomorphism (pr1 B x y)): let fi :=
  pr1
    (total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) (x,, xx)
       (y,, yy)),,
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B y x,,
   monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y
   :
   is_z_isomorphism (pr1 B x y)) in
Isos.is_z_iso_disp fi
  (pr2
     (total_braiding_data
        (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) (x,, xx)
        (y,, yy)))
→ is_z_isomorphism
    (total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) (x,, xx)
       (y,, yy))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     (x,, xx) (y,, yy))
  (total_braiding_data
     (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB) (y,, yy)
     (x,, xx))

    exact (pr2 (i (_ ,, disp_braiding_to_inverses DB _ _ xx yy))).
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_hexagon1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_hexagon1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
· total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
    (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)
· α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, z, x} =
total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x y
⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} z
· α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, x, z}
· y
  ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                               (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                  DB) x z

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
pr1
  (α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
       (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)
   · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, z, x}) =
pr1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} z
   · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, x, z}
   · y
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                  (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                     DB) x z)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y)
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z))
     (pr2
        (y
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} (z
                                 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x))))
  ?p
  (pr2
     (α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
      · total_braiding_data
          (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
          (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)
      · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, z, x})) =
pr2
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} z
   · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, x, z}
   · y
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                  (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                     DB) x z)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
pr1
  (α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
       (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)
   · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, z, x}) =
pr1
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} z
   · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, x, z}
   · y
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                  (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                     DB) x z)
 apply (pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        ((x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y)
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z))
     (pr2
        (y
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} (z
                                 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x))))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr1 z))
  (pr2
     (α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
      · total_braiding_data
          (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
          (y ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)
      · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, z, x})) =
pr2
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
     x y ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} z
   · α^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ y, x, z}
   · y
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                  (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                     DB) x z)
 apply disp_braiding_to_hexagon1.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_hexagon2
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M

braiding_law_hexagon2
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
· total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
    (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y) z
· αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ z, x, y} =
x
⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                             (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                DB) y z
· αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, z, y}
· total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x
    z ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
pr1
  (αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
       (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y) z
   · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ z, x, y}) =
pr1
  (x
   ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                   DB) y z
   · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, z, y}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x z
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (x
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} (y
                                 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)))
     (pr2
        ((z ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x)
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y))) ?p
  (pr2
     (αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
      · total_braiding_data
          (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
          (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y) z
      · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ z, x, y})) =
pr2
  (x
   ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                   DB) y z
   · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, z, y}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x z
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
pr1
  (αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
       (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y) z
   · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ z, x, y}) =
pr1
  (x
   ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                   DB) y z
   · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, z, y}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x z
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y)
 apply (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2
        (x
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} (y
                                 ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} z)))
     (pr2
        ((z ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} x)
         ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y)))
  ((pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr1 z))
  (pr2
     (αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, y, z}
      · total_braiding_data
          (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB)
          (x ⊗_{ total_monoidal DM} y) z
      · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ z, x, y})) =
pr2
  (x
   ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{l} total_braiding_data
                                (disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                   DB) y z
   · αinv^{ total_monoidal DM }_{ x, z, y}
   · total_braiding_data
       (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB) x z
     ⊗^{ total_monoidal DM}_{r} y)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
x, y, z: total_category D
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr2 x ⊗⊗_{ DM} (pr2 y ⊗⊗_{ DM} pr2 z))
     ((pr2 z ⊗⊗_{ DM} pr2 x) ⊗⊗_{ DM} pr2 y))
  ((pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
     (pr1 z))
  (dαinv^{ DM }_{ pr2 x, pr2 y, pr2 z} ;; disp_braiding_to_braiding
                                            DB
                                            (pr1 x
                                             ⊗_{ M} 
                                             pr1 y)
                                            (pr1 z)
                                            (pr2 x
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                             pr2 y)
                                            (pr2 z) ;; 
   dαinv^{ DM }_{ pr2 z, pr2 x, pr2 y}) =
pr2 x
⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} disp_braiding_to_braiding DB (pr1 y)
               (pr1 z) (pr2 y) (pr2 z) ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                          }_{ pr2 x,
                                          pr2 z,
                                          pr2 y} ;; 
disp_braiding_to_braiding DB (pr1 x) (pr1 z) (pr2 x)
  (pr2 z) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} pr2 y
 apply disp_braiding_to_hexagon2.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
braiding_law_hexagon
  (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))

M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M

(λ Binv : braiding_data (total_monoidal DM),
 braiding_laws ?pr1 Binv) ?pr10

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding B
(λ Binv : braiding_data (total_monoidal DM),
 braiding_laws
   (total_braiding_data (disp_braiding_to_braiding DB))
   Binv)
  (total_braiding_data
     (disp_braiding_to_braiding_inv DB))
 exact (total_braiding_laws DB).
  Defined.

End DisplayedBraided.

Section DisplayedSymmetric.

  Context {C : category}
    {D : disp_cat C}
    {M : monoidal C}
    (DM : disp_monoidal D M).

  Definition disp_symmetric_data (B : symmetric M) : UU
    := disp_braiding_data DM B.

  Definition disp_symmetric (B : symmetric M) : UU
    := ∑ DB : disp_symmetric_data B, disp_braiding_laws _ DB DB.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DSD: disp_symmetric_data B
disp_symmetric B

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DSD: disp_symmetric_data B
disp_symmetric B

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DSD: disp_symmetric_data B
disp_braiding_laws DM DSD DSD

    split3; try split; try (intro; intros); apply LP.
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
disp_braiding DM B

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
disp_braiding DM B

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
∑
DBinv : disp_braiding_data DM
          (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B),
disp_braiding_laws DM (pr1 DB) DBinv

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
disp_braiding_laws DM (pr1 DB) (pr1 DB)

    exact (pr2 DB).
  Defined.

  Coercion disp_symmetric_to_braiding : disp_symmetric >-> disp_braiding.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
symmetric (total_monoidal DM)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
symmetric (total_monoidal DM)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric B
braiding_laws (total_braiding_data DM (pr1 DB))
  (total_braiding_data DM (pr1 DB))

    exact (total_braiding_laws _ DB).
  Defined.

  Definition disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv
    {B : symmetric M}
    (c : disp_braiding_data DM B)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
         transportf _ (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y)) (c x y xx yy ;; c y x yy xx)
         = id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{DM} yy).

  Definition disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat
    {B : symmetric M}
    (c : disp_braiding_data DM B)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x1 x2 y1 y2 : C) (f : C⟦x1, x2⟧) (g : C⟦y1, y2⟧)
         (xx1 : D x1) (xx2 : D x2) (yy1 : D y1) (yy2 : D y2)
         (ff : xx1 -->[f] xx2) (gg : yy1 -->[g] yy2),
      transportf _ (tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,,M),,B) f g)
        (ff ⊗⊗^{DM} gg ;; c x2 y2 xx2 yy2)
      = c x1 y1 xx1 yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{DM} ff.

  Definition disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex
               {B : symmetric M}
    (c : disp_braiding_data DM B)
    : UU
    := ∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (zz : D z),
      transportf _ (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,,M),,B) x y z)
        (disp_monoidal_associator _ _ _ _ xx yy zz
      ;; c _ _ xx (yy ⊗⊗_{DM} zz)
      ;; disp_monoidal_associator _ _ _ _ yy zz xx)
      = c x y xx yy  ⊗⊗^{DM} id_disp zz
        ;; disp_monoidal_associator _ _ _ _ yy xx zz
        ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{DM} c x z xx zz.

  Definition disp_symm_braiding_laws
    {B : symmetric M}
    (c : disp_braiding_data DM B)
    : UU
    := disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
         × disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
         × disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
disp_braiding_law_hexagon2 DM c

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
disp_braiding_law_hexagon2 DM c

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  ((pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                                   (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; 
   dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}) =
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  ((pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                                   (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; 
   dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}) =
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy


    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  ((pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z} (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                                       (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                       zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                             }_{ zz,
                                             xx, yy}))) =
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z} (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
   (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                                    (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                    zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                          }_{ zz, xx,
                                          yy})) =
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                                 (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; 
                               dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx,
                               yy}) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z} (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
   (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                  zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                               zz
                                             ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},, ?Hf)
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; 
dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
     ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},, ?Hf)
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) 
           αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
         (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)))
  (pr1 ?Hff ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
                dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
 exact (pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z))). 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; 
dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
     ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) 
           αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
         (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)))
  (pr1 ?Hff ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
                dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
t:= disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz: is_disp_inverse
  ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x y z)
  dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz}

      exact (_ ,, (pr2 t,, pr1 t)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                        }_{ zz, xx,
                                        yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
     ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
         (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)))
  (pr1
     (let t :=
        disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz
        in
      dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                        }_{ zz, xx,
                                        yy} = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
     ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) 
           αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
         (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)))
  (pr1
     (let t :=
        disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz
        in
      dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
    dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
    c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C

p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c

yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
     ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
         (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)))
  (pr1
     (let t :=
        disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz
        in
      dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
?y =
z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
  ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
  (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
  (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
  (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
   · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
  (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z} (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
      (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z))

      apply pathsinv0inv0.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                        }_{ zz, xx,
                                        yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
          ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
          ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
          (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
           pr2
             (z_iso_inv
                (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
          (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
          (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
              (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z))))
  (pr1
     (let t :=
        disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz
        in
      dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))


    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_z_isomorphism (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,, ?Hf)
  (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y)) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) 
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,, ?Hf) 
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
         pr2
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right 
             (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
             ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
             ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
              pr2
                (z_iso_inv
                   (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
             (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
              · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
             (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                   αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                 (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x
                   y z)))))
  (pr1 ?Hff ;; (pr1
                  (let t :=
                     disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x
                       y z xx yy zz in
                   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},,
                   pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
                (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
                 dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                 c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_z_isomorphism (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_inverse_in_precat (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z) ?Goal0

      apply (pr122 B).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),, (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
  (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y)) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
      pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),, (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
         pr2
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right 
             (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
             ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
             ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
              pr2
                (z_iso_inv
                   (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
             (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
              · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
             (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                   αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                 (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x
                   y z)))))
  (pr1 ?Hff ;; (pr1
                  (let t :=
                     disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x
                       y z xx yy zz in
                   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},,
                   pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
                (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
                 dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                 c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),, (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
  (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_disp_inverse
  (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
   pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),, (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
  (c (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ?Goal0

      apply p_inv.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} =
transportf
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y)) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
      pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),, (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
         pr2
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
             ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
             ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
              pr2
                (z_iso_inv
                   (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
             (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
              · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
             (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                   αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                 (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x
                   y z)))))
  (pr1
     (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy),,
      p_inv (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ;; 
   (pr1
      (let t :=
         disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz
         in
       dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
    (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                    zz, yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
  (dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; id_disp
                                   ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                    ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y)) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
      pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),, (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
         pr2
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
             ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
             ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
              pr2
                (z_iso_inv
                   (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
             (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
              · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
             (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                   αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                 (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x
                   y z)))))
  (pr1
     (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy),,
      p_inv (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ;; 
   (pr1
      (let t :=
         disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy zz
         in
       dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
    (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                    zz, yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
