  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; id_disp
                                ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
            pr2
              (z_iso_inv
                 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 pr2
                   (z_iso_inv
                      (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y
                         z)))
                (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B))
                      x y z)))))
     (pr1
        (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy),,
         p_inv (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ;; 
      (pr1
         (let t :=
            disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy
              zz in
          dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
       (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                       }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
        c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))


    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},, ?Hf)
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},, ?Hf)
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (pr1 ?Hff ;; transportf
                 (mor_disp
                    (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                    ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                 (z_iso_inv_on_right
                    ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                    (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
                    ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                    (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
                     pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
                     (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                    αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                       pr2
                       (z_iso_inv
                       (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x
                       y z)))
                     · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
                       · 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                       · 
                       B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                    (! (! 
                       z_iso_inv_on_right
                       (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                       ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                       ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                       (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                       pr2
                       (z_iso_inv
                       (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x
                       y z)))
                       (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                       · 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
                       · 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                       · 
                       B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                       (! 
                       (assoc 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                       (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                       αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                       (pr222 
                       (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y
                       z)))))
                 (pr1
                    (c z 
                       (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                       (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy),,
                     p_inv 
                       (x ⊗_{ M} y) z 
                       (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ;; 
                  (pr1
                     (let t :=
                       disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM
                       x y z xx yy zz in
                      dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},,
                      pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
                   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
                    dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                    c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
 exact (pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M z x y))). 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M z x y)))
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) 
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (pr1 ?Hff ;; transportf
                 (mor_disp
                    (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                    ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                 (z_iso_inv_on_right
                    ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                    (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
                    ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                    (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
                     pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
                     (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                    αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                       pr2
                       (z_iso_inv
                       (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x
                       y z)))
                     · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
                       · 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                       · 
                       B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                    (! (! 
                       z_iso_inv_on_right
                       (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                       ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                       ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                       (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                       pr2
                       (z_iso_inv
                       (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x
                       y z)))
                       (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                       · 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
                       · 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                       · 
                       B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                       (! 
                       (assoc 
                       αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                       (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                       αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                       (pr222 
                       (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y
                       z)))))
                 (pr1
                    (c z 
                       (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                       (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy),,
                     p_inv 
                       (x ⊗_{ M} y) z 
                       (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ;; 
                  (pr1
                     (let t :=
                       disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM
                       x y z xx yy zz in
                      dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},,
                      pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
                   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; 
                    dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                    c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M z x y)))
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
t:= disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM z x y zz xx yy: is_disp_inverse
  ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) z x y)
  dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
   pr2 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M z x y)))
  dαinv^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy}

      exact (_ ,, (pr2 t,, pr1 t)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_associator_iso M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (pr1
     (let t :=
        disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM z x y zz xx yy
        in
      dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
   transportf
     (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
            pr2
              (z_iso_inv
                 (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y z)))
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 pr2
                   (z_iso_inv
                      (z_iso_from_associator_iso M x y
                         z)))
                (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (monoidal_braiding_laws B))
                      x y z)))))
     (pr1
        (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy),,
         p_inv (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz) ;; 
      (pr1
         (let t :=
            disp_monoidal_associatoriso DM x y z xx yy
              zz in
          dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz},, pr2 t,, pr1 t) ;; 
       (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                       }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
        c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; transportf
                                (mor_disp
                                   (zz
                                    ⊗⊗_{ DM} (xx
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                   ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                    ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                (z_iso_inv_on_right
                                   ((x ⊗_{ M} y)
                                    ⊗_{ M} z)
                                   (z
                                    ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
                                   ((z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                    ⊗_{ M} y)
                                   (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y)
                                      z,,
                                    pr1 B z
                                      (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
                                    (pr122 B)
                                      (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                                   αinv^{ M }_{ z, x,
                                   y}
                                   (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                                    · (x
                                       ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                       pr1 B y z
                                       · αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                       · pr1 B x z
                                         ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                   (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                                           (x
                                            ⊗_{ M} 
                                            (y
                                             ⊗_{ M} z))
                                           ((x
                                             ⊗_{ M} y)
                                            ⊗_{ M} z)
                                           ((z
                                             ⊗_{ M} x)
                                            ⊗_{ M} y)
                                           (αinv^{ M
                                            }_{ x, y,
                                            z},,
                                            make_is_z_isomorphism
                                              αinv^{ M
                                              }_{ x,
                                              y, z}
                                              α^{ M
                                              }_{ x,
                                              y, z}
                                              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                                                 (monoidal_associatorisolaw
                                                 M x y
                                                 z)))
                                           (pr1 B
                                              (x
                                               ⊗_{ M} y)
                                              z
                                            · αinv^{ M
                                              }_{ z,
                                              x, y})
                                           (x
                                            ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                            pr1 B y z
                                            · αinv^{ M
                                              }_{ x,
                                              z, y}
                                            · pr1 B x
                                                z
                                              ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                           (! (assoc
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 y, z}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ z,
                                                 x, y} @
                                               (pr222 
                                                (pr2 B))
                                                 x y z)))))
                                (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                   (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
                                 (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy,
                                  zz} ;; (xx
                                          ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                          c y z yy zz ;; 
                                          dαinv^{ DM
                                          }_{ xx, zz,
                                          yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
        (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
           (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
           ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
           (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
            pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
            (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
           αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
           (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
            · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
               · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
               · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
           (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                   (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                   ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                   ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                   (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                    make_is_z_isomorphism
                      αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                         (monoidal_associatorisolaw M
                            x y z)))
                   (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                    · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                   (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                    · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                    · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                   (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                         (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                         αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                       (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                    (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
                                  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy,
                                   zz} ;; (xx
                                           ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                           c y z yy zz ;; 
                                           dαinv^{ DM
                                           }_{ xx, zz,
                                           yy} ;; 
                                           c x z xx zz
                                           ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                 (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
                               (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy,
                                zz} ;; (xx
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                        c y z yy zz ;; 
                                        dαinv^{ DM
                                        }_{ xx, zz,
                                        yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; (c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                 (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
                               (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy,
                                zz} ;; (xx
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                        c y z yy zz ;; 
                                        dαinv^{ DM
                                        }_{ xx, zz,
                                        yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                   (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
      (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (xx
                                   ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                   dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (transportb
        (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
           ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
        (assoc
           (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
           α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
                                      zz
                                      (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
         dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (xx
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                     c y z yy zz ;; 
                                     dαinv^{ DM
                                     }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                                     c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
          (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
          (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
           · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
              · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
           ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
        (! assoc
             (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
              · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
             α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
              · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
                                      zz
                                      (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
         dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (xx
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                     c y z yy zz ;; 
                                     dαinv^{ DM
                                     }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                                     c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (xx
                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy
                                              zz ;; 
                               dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (xx
                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy
                                              zz ;; 
                               dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
?b = id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                                (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; (xx
                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy
                                              zz ;; 
                               dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                               yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                      ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                             (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; dα^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 yy,
                                                 zz} ;; 
(xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz
                             (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; dα^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 yy,
                                                 zz} =
?y'

      exact p.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
p:= transportb_transpose_right (p_hex1 z x y zz xx yy): dα^{ DM }_{ zz, xx, yy} ;; 
c z (x ⊗_{ M} y) zz (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
   xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
     ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                     zz, yy} ;; xx
                                                ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                c z y
                                                 zz yy) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
     ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) z x y)
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                     zz, yy} ;; xx
                                                ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                c z y
                                                 zz yy) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
     ((pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y)
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                     zz, yy} ;; xx
                                                ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                c z y
                                                 zz yy) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)))
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y)
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                     zz, yy} ;; xx
                                                ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                c z y
                                                 zz yy) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
        (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
         · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                     zz, yy} ;; xx
                                                ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                c z y
                                                 zz yy ;; 
      (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM
                                      }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
       c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                  yy} ;; xx
                                         ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                         c z y zz yy ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy zz ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc
        (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
           ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
        (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
               · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
               · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
        (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM
                                         }_{ xx, zz,
                                         yy} ;; (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c z y
                                                 zz yy ;; 
                                                 transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 xx
                                                 (yy
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
