M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c z y
                                                 zz yy ;; 
                                                 transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 xx
                                                 (yy
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c z y
                                                 zz yy ;; 
                                                 transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 xx
                                                 (yy
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
?b = id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c z y
                                                 zz yy ;; 
                                                 transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 xx
                                                 (yy
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))))) =
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy ;; transportf
                                 (mor_disp
                                    (pr1 DM x
                                       (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                       (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz))
                                    (pr1 DM
                                       (z ⊗_{ M} x) y
                                       (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                       yy))
                                 (assoc
                                    (x
                                     ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                    αinv^{ M }_{ x, z,
                                    y}
                                    (pr1 B x z
                                     ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                 (xx
                                  ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                  (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                   zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
     (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y} (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy ;; (xx
                                   ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
                                   (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                    zz, yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy ;; (xx
                                ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy
                                               zz ;; 
                                (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                 zz, yy} ;; c x z xx
                                              zz
                                            ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy ;; xx
                                  ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z
                                                 yy zz ;; 
   (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                  ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy ;; xx
                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy
                                              zz ;; 
(dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) = 
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c z y zz yy ;; xx
                               ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c y z yy
                                              zz = 
?y'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
  (bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y) (y ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y) (pr1 B y z))
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} (c z y zz yy ;; c y z yy zz)) = 
?y'

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
  (bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y) (y ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y) (pr1 B y z))
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} (c z y zz yy ;; c y z yy zz)) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
?b = ?y'
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
  (bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y) (y ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y) (pr1 B y z))
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} (c z y zz yy ;; c y z yy zz)) = 
?b

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
c z y zz yy ;; c y z yy zz = ?t2

        apply p_inv.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 DM x (z ⊗_{ M} y) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
  (bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y) (y ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y) (pr1 B y z))
  (xx
   ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} transportb
                  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                     (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                  (pr2
                     (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z))
                  (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))) = ?y'


      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
xx
⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} transportb
               (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                  (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
               (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z))
               (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) = ?t2

      exact (disp_tensor_with_id_left DM (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) xx (zz ⊗⊗_{DM} yy)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (compose
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 z y))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 z y)
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 (αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 · 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 xx
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 xx
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                                 (bifunctor_leftcomp
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B z y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B y z))
                                                 (transportb
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (λ 
                                                 i : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y,
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y
                                                 ⟧,
                                                 x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (monoidal_braiding_inverses
                                                 B y z)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftid
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))) ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (compose
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 z y))
                                                 (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                                 (! 
                                                 assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 z y)
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 (αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 · 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 xx
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (pr1
                                                 DM x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 xx
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                                 (bifunctor_leftcomp
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B z y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B y z))
                                                 (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                                 (! 
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (λ 
                                                 i : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y,
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y
                                                 ⟧,
                                                 x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (monoidal_braiding_inverses
                                                 B y z)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftid
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))) ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; transportf
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (xx
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                               (pr1 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                            (! assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 z y)
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 (αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 · 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                             maponpaths
                                               (compose
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 z y))
                                               (assoc
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                 pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                                 αinv^{ M
                                                 }_{ x,
                                                 z, y}
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                            (transportf
                                               (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                               (! 
                                                (maponpaths
                                                 (λ 
                                                 i : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y,
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y
                                                 ⟧,
                                                 x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (monoidal_braiding_inverses
                                                 B y z)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftid
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)) @
                                                bifunctor_leftcomp
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B z y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B y z))
                                               (id_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))) ;; 
                                             (dαinv^{ DM
                                              }_{ xx,
                                              zz, yy} ;; 
                                              c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
            maponpaths
              (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
              (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
                 αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; (transportf
                                                 (mor_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                                 (! 
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (λ 
                                                 i : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y,
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y
                                                 ⟧,
                                                 x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (monoidal_braiding_inverses
                                                 B y z)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftid
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftcomp
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B z y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B y z))
                                                 (id_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))) ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; (transportf
                                             (mor_disp
                                                (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                                (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)))
                                             (! (maponpaths
                                                 (λ 
                                                 i : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y,
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y
                                                 ⟧,
                                                 x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (monoidal_braiding_inverses
                                                 B y z)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftid
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)) @
                                              bifunctor_leftcomp
                                                M x
                                                (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                (pr1 B
                                                 z y)
                                                (pr1 B
                                                 y z))
                                             (id_disp
                                                (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))) ;; 
                                           (dαinv^{ DM
                                            }_{ xx,
                                            zz, yy} ;; 
                                            c x z xx
                                              zz
                                            ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; transportf
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (xx
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                               (pr1 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                            (cancel_postcomposition
                                               (identity
                                                 (x
                                                 ⊗_{ M} 
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)))
                                               (x
                                                ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                pr1 B
                                                 z y
                                                · 
                                                x
                                                ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
                                                pr1 B
                                                 y z)
                                               (αinv^{ M
                                                }_{ x,
                                                z, y}
                                                · 
                                                pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                               (! 
                                                (maponpaths
                                                 (λ 
                                                 i : 
                                                 C
                                                 ⟦ 
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y,
                                                 z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y
                                                 ⟧,
                                                 x
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 (monoidal_braiding_inverses
                                                 B y z)) @
                                                 bifunctor_leftid
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)) @
                                                bifunctor_leftcomp
                                                 M x
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (y
                                                 ⊗_{ M} z)
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B z y)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 B y z)))
                                            (id_disp
                                               (xx
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) ;; 
                                             (dαinv^{ DM
                                              }_{ xx,
                                              zz, yy} ;; 
                                              c x z xx
                                                zz
                                              ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
