        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (cancel_postcomposition
              (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
              (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
               · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
               · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
              (! (maponpaths
                    (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y
                           ⟧, x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                    (pr2
                       (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y
                          z)) @
                  bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
               bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
                 (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
                 (pr1 B y z)))))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx,
                                      zz, yy} ;; (id_disp
                                                 (xx
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) ;; 
                                                 (dαinv^{ DM
                                                 }_{ xx,
                                                 zz,
                                                 yy} ;; 
                                                 c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; (id_disp
                                             (xx
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                              (zz
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) ;; 
                                           (dαinv^{ DM
                                            }_{ xx,
                                            zz, yy} ;; 
                                            c x z xx
                                              zz
                                            ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (xx
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                               (pr1 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                            (id_left
                                               (αinv^{ M
                                                }_{ x,
                                                z, y}
                                                · 
                                                pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                            (dαinv^{ DM
                                             }_{ xx,
                                             zz, yy} ;; 
                                             c x z xx
                                               zz
                                             ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (xx
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                               (pr1 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                            (id_left
                                               (αinv^{ M
                                                }_{ x,
                                                z, y}
                                                · 
                                                pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                            (dαinv^{ DM
                                             }_{ xx,
                                             zz, yy} ;; 
                                             c x z xx
                                               zz
                                             ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
?b = id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                   yy} ;; transportb
                                            (mor_disp
                                               (xx
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                                (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                               (pr1 DM
                                                 (z
                                                 ⊗_{ M} x)
                                                 y
                                                 (zz
                                                 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                                 yy))
                                            (id_left
                                               (αinv^{ M
                                                }_{ x,
                                                z, y}
                                                · 
                                                pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                            (dαinv^{ DM
                                             }_{ xx,
                                             zz, yy} ;; 
                                             c x z xx
                                               zz
                                             ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                yy} ;; transportb
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (xx
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                            (pr1 DM
                                               (z
                                                ⊗_{ M} x)
                                               y
                                               (zz
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                               yy))
                                         (id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                         (dαinv^{ DM
                                          }_{ xx, zz,
                                          yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                yy} ;; transportf
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (xx
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} 
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                            (pr1 DM
                                               (z
                                                ⊗_{ M} x)
                                               y
                                               (zz
                                                ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                               yy))
                                         (! id_left
                                              (αinv^{ M
                                               }_{ x,
                                               z, y}
                                               · pr1 B
                                                 x z
                                                 ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                         (dαinv^{ DM
                                          }_{ xx, zz,
                                          yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                 (mor_disp
                                    (pr1 DM
                                       (x ⊗_{ M} z) y
                                       (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                       yy)
                                    (pr1 DM
                                       (z ⊗_{ M} x) y
                                       (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                       yy))
                                 (maponpaths
                                    (compose
                                       α^{ M }_{ x, z,
                                       y})
                                    (! id_left
                                         (αinv^{ M
                                          }_{ x, z, y}
                                          · pr1 B x z
                                            ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                 (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                                  yy} ;; (dαinv^{ DM
                                          }_{ xx, zz,
                                          yy} ;; c x z
                                                 xx zz
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; (dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
                            c x z xx zz
                            ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) = ?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} z) y (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz,
                              yy} ;; c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) =
?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; 
c x z xx zz ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy = ?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} ;; dαinv^{ DM }_{ xx, zz, yy} =
?y'

      apply disp_monoidal_associatoriso.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                          y
                                          (xx
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                          yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (x
                                              ⊗_{ M} z)
                                             y
                                             (xx
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                             yy)
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (z
                                              ⊗_{ M} x)
                                             y
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                             yy))
                                       (assoc
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y}
                                          αinv^{ M
                                          }_{ x, z, y}
                                          (pr1 B x z
                                           ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                       (transportb
                                          (mor_disp
                                             ((xx
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                             ((xx
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                          (pr1
                                             ((pr222 
                                               (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                                z y))
                                          (id_disp
                                             ((xx
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) ;; 
                                        c x z xx zz
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                          y
                                          (xx
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                          yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (transportf
                                       (mor_disp
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (x
                                              ⊗_{ M} z)
                                             y
                                             (xx
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                             yy)
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (z
                                              ⊗_{ M} x)
                                             y
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                             yy))
                                       (! assoc
                                            α^{ M
                                            }_{ x, z,
                                            y}
                                            αinv^{ M
                                            }_{ x, z,
                                            y}
                                            (pr1 B x z
                                             ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                       (transportf
                                          (mor_disp
                                             ((xx
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                             ((xx
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                          (! pr1
                                               ((pr222 
                                                 (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                                 z y))
                                          (id_disp
                                             ((xx
                                               ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) ;; 
                                        c x z xx zz
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                          y
                                          (xx
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                          yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (! assoc
                                         α^{ M }_{ x,
                                         z, y}
                                         αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (transportf
                                       (mor_disp
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
                                       (! pr1
                                            ((pr222 
                                              (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                               z y))
                                       (id_disp
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) ;; 
                                     c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                          y
                                          (xx
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                          yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (! assoc
                                         α^{ M }_{ x,
                                         z, y}
                                         αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (transportf
                                       (mor_disp
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (z
                                              ⊗_{ M} x)
                                             y
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                             yy))
                                       (cancel_postcomposition
                                          (identity
                                             ((x
                                               ⊗_{ M} z)
                                              ⊗_{ M} y))
                                          (α^{ M
                                           }_{ x, z,
                                           y}
                                           · αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y})
                                          (pr1 B x z
                                           ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                          (! pr1
                                               ((pr222 
                                                 (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                                 z y)))
                                       (id_disp
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
                                        c x z xx zz
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       ((xx
                                         ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                        ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (cancel_postcomposition
                                       (identity
                                          ((x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                           ⊗_{ M} y))
                                       (α^{ M }_{ x,
                                        z, y}
                                        · αinv^{ M
                                          }_{ x, z, y})
                                       (pr1 B x z
                                        ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                       (! pr1
                                            ((pr222 
                                              (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                               z y)) @
                                     ! assoc
                                         α^{ M }_{ x,
                                         z, y}
                                         αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (id_disp
                                       ((xx
                                         ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                        ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ;; 
                                     c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       ((xx
                                         ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                        ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (cancel_postcomposition
                                       (identity
                                          ((x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                           ⊗_{ M} y))
                                       (α^{ M }_{ x,
                                        z, y}
                                        · αinv^{ M
                                          }_{ x, z, y})
                                       (pr1 B x z
                                        ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                       (! pr1
                                            ((pr222 
                                              (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                               z y)) @
                                     ! assoc
                                         α^{ M }_{ x,
                                         z, y}
                                         αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (transportb
                                       (mor_disp
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (z
                                              ⊗_{ M} x)
                                             y
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                             yy))
                                       (id_left
                                          (pr1 B x z
                                           ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                       (c x z xx zz
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       ((xx
                                         ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                        ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (cancel_postcomposition
                                       (identity
                                          ((x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                           ⊗_{ M} y))
                                       (α^{ M }_{ x,
                                        z, y}
                                        · αinv^{ M
                                          }_{ x, z, y})
                                       (pr1 B x z
