                                        ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                       (! pr1
                                            ((pr222 
                                              (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                               z y)) @
                                     ! assoc
                                         α^{ M }_{ x,
                                         z, y}
                                         αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (transportf
                                       (mor_disp
                                          ((xx
                                            ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                          (pr1 DM
                                             (z
                                              ⊗_{ M} x)
                                             y
                                             (zz
                                              ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                             yy))
                                       (! id_left
                                            (pr1 B x z
                                             ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
                                       (c x z xx zz
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; transportf
                                    (mor_disp
                                       ((xx
                                         ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
                                        ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
                                       (pr1 DM
                                          (z ⊗_{ M} x)
                                          y
                                          (zz
                                           ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                          yy))
                                    (! id_left
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     cancel_postcomposition
                                       (identity
                                          ((x ⊗_{ M} z)
                                           ⊗_{ M} y))
                                       (α^{ M }_{ x,
                                        z, y}
                                        · αinv^{ M
                                          }_{ x, z, y})
                                       (pr1 B x z
                                        ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                                       (! pr1
                                            ((pr222 
                                              (monoidal_associatorlaw
                                                 M)) x
                                               z y)) @
                                     ! assoc
                                         α^{ M }_{ x,
                                         z, y}
                                         αinv^{ M
                                         }_{ x, z, y}
                                         (pr1 B x z
                                          ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
                                     maponpaths
                                       (compose
                                          α^{ M }_{ x,
                                          z, y})
                                       (! id_left
                                            (αinv^{ M
                                             }_{ x, z,
                                             y}
                                             · pr1 B x
                                                 z
                                               ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))
                                    (c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
           (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! pr1
                ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x
                   z y)) @
         ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (! id_left
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))))
     (c z x zz xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x z xx zz
                                     ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
           (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! pr1
                ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x
                   z y)) @
         ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (! id_left
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
        (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x)
           (x ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x)
           (pr1 B x z))
        ((c z x zz xx ;; c x z xx zz) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
           (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! pr1
                ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x
                   z y)) @
         ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (! id_left
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
        (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x)
           (x ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x)
           (pr1 B x z))
        ((c z x zz xx ;; c x z xx zz) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
?b = id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
           (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! pr1
                ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x
                   z y)) @
         ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (! id_left
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
        (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x)
           (x ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x)
           (pr1 B x z))
        ((c z x zz xx ;; c x z xx zz) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
(c z x zz xx ;; c x z xx zz) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy = ?t2

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
c z x zz xx ;; c x z xx zz = ?t2

      exact (pr1 (p_inv _ _ xx zz)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
     (maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         cancel_postcomposition
           (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
           (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! pr1
                ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x
                   z y)) @
         ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
             (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
           (! id_left
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
           (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
        (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x)
           (x ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x)
           (pr1 B x z))
        (transportb
           (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
           (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z))
           (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x) (pr1 B x z) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! pr1
             ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x z y)) @
      ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
          (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! id_left
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z))
     (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x) (pr1 B x z) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! pr1
             ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x z y)) @
      ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
          (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! id_left
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z))
     (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
?b = id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x) (pr1 B x z) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! pr1
             ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x z y)) @
      ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
          (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! id_left
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z))
     (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) = 
?b

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportb
  (mor_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z))
  (id_disp (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)) ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy = ?t2

      apply disp_tensor_with_id_right.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x) (pr1 B x z) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! pr1
             ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x z y)) @
      ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
          (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! id_left
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} x, z ⊗_{ M} x ⟧,
         i ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z)) @
      bifunctor_rightid M y (z ⊗_{ M} x))
     (id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy)
     (pr1 DM (z ⊗_{ M} x) y (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) yy))
  (bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x) (pr1 B x z) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! pr1
             ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x z y)) @
      ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
          (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! id_left
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
        ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (! (maponpaths
           (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} x, z ⊗_{ M} x ⟧,
            i ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z)) @
         bifunctor_rightid M y (z ⊗_{ M} x)))
     (id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)
     ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (! (maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} x, z ⊗_{ M} x ⟧,
         i ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x z)) @
      bifunctor_rightid M y (z ⊗_{ M} x)) @
   bifunctor_rightcomp M y (z ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} z)
     (z ⊗_{ M} x) (pr1 B z x) (pr1 B x z) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (! id_left (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      cancel_postcomposition
        (identity ((x ⊗_{ M} z) ⊗_{ M} y))
        (α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
        (! pr1
             ((pr222 (monoidal_associatorlaw M)) x z y)) @
      ! assoc α^{ M }_{ x, z, y} αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
          (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
      maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! id_left
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} y)))
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
            · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
           (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
           (! (maponpaths
                 (λ i : C ⟦ z ⊗_{ M} y, z ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
                  x ⊗^{ M}_{l} i)
                 (pr2
                    (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y z)) @
               bifunctor_leftid M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)) @
            bifunctor_leftcomp M x (z ⊗_{ M} y)
              (y ⊗_{ M} z) (z ⊗_{ M} y) (pr1 B z y)
              (pr1 B y z)))) @
   maponpaths (compose (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
     (maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
        (! assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
             (αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
         maponpaths (compose (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y))
           (assoc (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z)
              αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
              (pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)))) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y
      · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
         · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
         · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   assoc (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (pr1 B z x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y · α^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B z y)
     (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y)
      · α^{ M }_{ x, y, z})
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
      · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
     (! (pr122 (pr2 B)) z x y) @
   ! assoc (α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} · pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
        · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y) @
   ! assoc α^{ M }_{ z, x, y} (pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y))
       (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
        · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
           · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
           · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)) @
   maponpaths (compose α^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
     (z_iso_inv_on_right ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
        (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
        ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
        (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z,,
         pr1 B z (x ⊗_{ M} y),,
         (pr122 B) (x ⊗_{ M} y) z)
        αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
         · (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
            · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
            · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y))
        (! (! z_iso_inv_on_right
                (x ⊗_{ M} (y ⊗_{ M} z))
                ((x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z)
                ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
                (αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z},,
                 make_is_z_isomorphism
                   αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   α^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                   (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                      (monoidal_associatorisolaw M x y
                         z)))
                (pr1 B (x ⊗_{ M} y) z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y})
                (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} pr1 B y z
                 · αinv^{ M }_{ x, z, y}
                 · pr1 B x z ⊗^{ M}_{r} y)
                (! (assoc αinv^{ M }_{ x, y, z}
                      (pr1 B (...) z)
                      αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y} @
                    (pr222 (pr2 B)) x y z))))) @
   z_iso_inv_on_right (z ⊗_{ M} (x ⊗_{ M} y))
     ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y) ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y)
     (αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y},,
      make_is_z_isomorphism αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        α^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (monoidal_associatorisolaw M z x y)))
     (identity ((z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y))
     αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}
     (! id_right αinv^{ M }_{ z, x, y}))
  (id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) =
id_disp ((zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_braiding_iso DM c c
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM c
p_hex1: disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
isaset
  (C ⟦ (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y, (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⊗_{ M} y ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
disp_braiding_law_naturality_left DM c

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
disp_braiding_law_naturality_left DM c

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM} gg ;; 
c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp xx)
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
q':= transportb_transpose_right (! tq @ q): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
(xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
        ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                       yy2
                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                       id_disp xx)))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
q': transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1))
  (bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)) ;; 
(xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
        ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                       yy2
                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                       id_disp xx)))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
q': transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1))
  (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)) ;; 
(xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
       (B x y2))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
          ((C,, M),, B) 
          (identity x) g)
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                       yy2
                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                       id_disp xx)))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;;
