                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
q': transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
       (B x y2))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
          ((C,, M),, B) 
          (identity x) g)
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                       yy2
                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                       id_disp xx)))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
q': transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
       (B x y2))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
          ((C,, M),, B) 
          (identity x) g)
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                       yy2
                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                       id_disp xx)))
q'':= transportb_transpose_right q': id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; 
(xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
          (B x y2))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
           (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
        (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
             ((C,, M),, B) 
             (identity x) g)
        (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; 
         (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
          yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
          id_disp xx))))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
                              c x y2 xx yy2)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
q:= transportb_transpose_right
  (p_nat x x y1 y2 (identity x) g xx xx yy1 yy2
     (id_disp xx) gg): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g)
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))
tq:= assoc_disp_var (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1)
  (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg) (c x y2 xx yy2): id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2 =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
  (id_disp xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy1 ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2))
q': transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; 
   (xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; 
    c x y2 xx yy2)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
       (B x y2))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
          ((C,, M),, B) 
          (identity x) g)
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                       yy2
                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                       id_disp xx)))
q'':= transportb_transpose_right q': id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; 
(xx ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} gg ;; c x y2 xx yy2) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
     (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1)
        (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
          (B x y2))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
           (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
        (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
             ((C,, M),, B) 
             (identity x) g)
        (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; 
         (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
          yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
          id_disp xx))))
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
        (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
             (identity x) g)
        (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
     (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
     (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
     (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
        (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
             (identity x) g)
        (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx))))

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B

yy2: D y2

gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))

             (identity x) g)
        (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                                 id_disp
                                                 xx))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                           ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                           id_disp xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
       ((C,, M),, B) (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) 
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) 
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition 
       (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; 
                     yy2 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                     id_disp xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                           ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                           id_disp xx))

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
?t1 =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; (gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                        ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                        id_disp xx)

      apply pathsinv0, assoc_disp.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
        (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
        (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                             ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                             id_disp
                                               xx))

D: disp_cat C

yy2: D y2

gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2

                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)

                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =

  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                             ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l}

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; transportf
                               (mor_disp
                                  (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1)
                                  (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
                               (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left
                                  B x y1 y2 g)
                               (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg
                                                 ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
       (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
       (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
   ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                          ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                          id_disp xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; 
                                 gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
       (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
       (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
   ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                          ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                          id_disp xx)

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C

B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
       (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
       (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
   ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
       (identity x) g @
   ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1) (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g)
       (B x y2) @
   ! cancel_postcomposition (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
       (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
       (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
       (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
        (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g))
     (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; 
                                    gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx))) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                       id_disp xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     (maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
        (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g))
     (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; 
                                    gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx))) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                       id_disp xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) ;; (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; 
                                 gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                       id_disp xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     (id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                       id_disp xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                       id_disp xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; yy2
                                       ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} 
                                       id_disp xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; transportb
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (yy2
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                            (yy2
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
                                         (bifunctor_leftid
                                            M y2 x)
                                         (id_disp
                                            (yy2
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B

xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)

          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @

          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; transportf
                                         (mor_disp
                                            (yy2
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)
                                            (yy2
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
                                         (! bifunctor_leftid
                                              M y2 x)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
   maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
   ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
          (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
          (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
      ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
          (identity x) g @
      ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
      ! cancel_postcomposition
          (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
          (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
          (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
          (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
         · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
     (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; id_disp
                                            (yy2
                                             ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (maponpaths
     (compose
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
         · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
     (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
      maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
        (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
      ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
             (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
             (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
         ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
             (identity x) g @
         ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
         ! cancel_postcomposition
             (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
             (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
             (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; id_disp
                                         (yy2
                                          ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B

xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! maponpaths
       (compose
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
           · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
       (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     (! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
      maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
        (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
      ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
             (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
             (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
         ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
             (identity x) g @
         ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
         ! cancel_postcomposition
             (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
             (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
             (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
             (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x)))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; id_disp
                                         (yy2
                                          ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  ((! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
    maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
      (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
    ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
           (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
           (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
       ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
           (identity x) g @
       ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
       ! cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
           (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
           (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
           · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
       (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx ;; id_disp
                                         (yy2
                                          ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  ((! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
    maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
      (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
    ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
           (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
           (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
       ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
           (identity x) g @
       ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
       ! cancel_postcomposition
           (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
           (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
           (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
           (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))) @
   ! maponpaths
       (compose
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
           · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
       (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (id_right
     (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
      · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! id_right
       (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
        · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     ((! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
       maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
         (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2
            g) @
       ! (! assoc
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
              (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
              (y2
               ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
          ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
              (identity x) g @
          ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
              (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
          ! cancel_postcomposition
              (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
              (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
              (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
              (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))) @
      ! maponpaths
          (compose
             (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
              · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
          (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x y1 xx yy1) (yy2 ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (! (! id_right
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
           · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
     ((! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
       maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
         (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2
            g) @
       ! (! assoc
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
              (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
              (y2
               ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
          ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
              (identity x) g @
          ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
              (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
          ! cancel_postcomposition
              (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
              (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
              (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
              (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))) @
      ! maponpaths
          (compose
             (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
              · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
          (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x))
     (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx)) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy1) (pr1 DM y2 x yy2 xx))
  (((! id_left (B x y1 · g ⊗^{ M}_{r} x) @
     maponpaths (compose (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1)))
       (monoidal_braiding_naturality_left B x y1 y2 g) @
     ! (! assoc (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1)
            (g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)
            (y2 ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{l} identity x) @
        ! tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
            (identity x) g @
        ! assoc (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
            (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g) (B x y2) @
        ! cancel_postcomposition
            (identity (x ⊗_{ M} y1))
            (identity x ⊗^{ M}_{r} y1)
            (x ⊗^{ M}_{l} g · B x y2)
            (! bifunctor_rightid M y1 x))) @
    ! maponpaths
        (compose
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
            · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x))
        (! bifunctor_leftid M y2 x)) @
   ! (! id_right
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y1
           · g ⊗^{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)}_{r} x)))
  (c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx) =
c x y1 xx yy1 ;; gg ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} xx

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x, y1, y2: C
xx: D x
yy1: D y1
yy2: D y2
g: C ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧
gg: yy1 -->[ g] yy2
isaset
  (C ⟦ x ⊗_{ M} y1, y2 ⊗_{ pr2 ((C,, M),, B)} x ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
disp_braiding_law_naturality_right DM c

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
disp_braiding_law_naturality_right DM c

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
  (c x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff) =
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
q:= ! p_nat x1 x2 y y f (identity y) xx1 xx2 yy yy ff
    (id_disp yy): c x1 y xx1 yy ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} ff =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
  (c x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff) =
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
q:= ! p_nat x1 x2 y y f (identity y) xx1 xx2 yy yy ff
    (id_disp yy): c x1 y xx1 yy ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} ff =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
c x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
q:= ! p_nat x1 x2 y y f (identity y) xx1 xx2 yy yy ff
    (id_disp yy): c x1 y xx1 yy ;; id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} ff =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
qq:= specialized_transport_lemma 
  (c x1 y xx1 yy) ff
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y)) q: c x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
      B x1 y · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
c x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
qq:= specialized_transport_lemma 
  (c x1 y xx1 yy) ff
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
     ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y)) q: c x1 y xx1 yy ;; yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} ff =

      B x1 y · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
     (identity y) @

xx2: D x2

transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
     (identity y) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧, B x1 y · i)

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
     (identity y) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧, B x1 y · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
     (monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
     (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! (tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
        (identity y) @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
         B x1 y · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
     (! monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)
     (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f @
   ! (tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
        (identity y) @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
         B x1 y · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! ((tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
         (identity y) @
       maponpaths
         (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
          B x1 y · i)
         (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)) @
      monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! ((tensor_sym_mon_braiding 
         ((C,, M),, B) f 
         (identity y) @
       maponpaths
         (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
          B x1 y · i)
         (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)) @
      monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! ((tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
         (identity y) @
       maponpaths
         (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
          B x1 y · i)
         (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)) @
      monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?y =
! ((tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f
      (identity y) @
    maponpaths
      (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧,
       B x1 y · i)
      (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)) @
   monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f)

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?t1 =
(tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y) @
 maponpaths
   (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧, B x1 y · i)
   (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)) @
monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
maponpaths
  (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
   i · pr1 B x2 y)
  (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f) =
(tensor_sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) f (identity y) @
 maponpaths
   (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} x1, y ⊗_{ M} x2 ⟧, B x1 y · i)
   (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y f)) @
monoidal_braiding_naturality_right B x1 x2 y f

      apply homset_property.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! maponpaths
       (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
        i · pr1 B x2 y)
       (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

       (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C

xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (! maponpaths
       (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?y =
! maponpaths
    (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
     i · pr1 B x2 y)
    (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f)

      apply (maponpathsinv0  (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧, i · pr1 B x2 y)).

  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,

     (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
      i · pr1 B x2 y)
     (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx1 ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (pr1 DM y x2 yy xx2))
  (maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ x1 ⊗_{ M} y, x2 ⊗_{ M} y ⟧,
      i · pr1 B x2 y)
     (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f))
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy)

      apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy ;; c x2 y xx2 yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x1 y xx1 yy) (pr1 DM x2 y xx2 yy))
  (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy) ;; c x2 y xx2 yy

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
x1, x2, y: C
xx1: D x1
xx2: D x2
yy: D y
f: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
ff: xx1 -->[ f] xx2
ff ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp yy =
transportf
  (mor_disp (pr1 DM x1 y xx1 yy) (pr1 DM x2 y xx2 yy))
  (! when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M y f)
  (ff ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} yy)

    apply disp_tensor_with_id_on_right.
  Qed.

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
c y x yy xx ;; c x y xx yy =
transportb
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (id_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))

c x y xx yy ;; c y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))

  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (id_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)) =
c y x yy xx ;; c x y xx yy

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M

c: disp_braiding_data DM B

x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
id_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) = ?t2

        exact (! p_inv y x yy xx).
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportb
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
     (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
     (c y x yy xx ;; c x y xx yy)) =
c y x yy xx ;; c x y xx yy

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportf
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (c y x yy xx ;; c x y xx yy) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx) (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (c y x yy xx ;; c x y xx yy)

D: disp_cat C

x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x) =
pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y)

      apply homset_property.

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
     (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
     (c x y xx yy ;; c y x yy xx)) =
c x y xx yy ;; c y x yy xx

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (c x y xx yy ;; c y x yy xx) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (c x y xx yy ;; c y x yy xx)

x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y) =
pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
disp_braiding_law_hexagon1 DM c

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
∏ (x y z : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y) (zz : D z),
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq:= specialized_transport_lemma
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz}) 
  (c x z xx zz)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (! q): c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
    yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
    yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
qq':= transportb_transpose_right qq: c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
(dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
 yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
           y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
    yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
qq':= transportb_transpose_right qq: c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
(dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
 yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
           y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
qq'':= specialized_transport_lemma' 
  (c x y xx yy)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
   yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
           y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
  (! assoc
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
          (identity z)) 
       (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z)) qq': c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; 
(dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
 yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
          (identity z)) 
       (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z
            ⟧,
      i
      · (mon_lassociator y x z
         · y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                       ((C,, M),, B) x z))
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M
        z (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
           M y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C

B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B

zz: D z
