  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
    yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
qq':= transportb_transpose_right qq: c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
(dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
 yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
           y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
qq'': transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
      ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
   yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
          (identity z)) 
       (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z
            ⟧,
      i
      · (mon_lassociator y x z
         · y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                       ((C,, M),, B) x z))
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M
        z (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
           M y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
    yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
qq':= transportb_transpose_right qq: c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
(dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
 yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
           y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
qq'': transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
      ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
   yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
          (identity z)) 
       (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z
            ⟧,
      i
      · (mon_lassociator y x z
         · y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                       ((C,, M),, B) x z))
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M
        z (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
           M y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
qq''':= transportb_transpose_right qq'': c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z 
        (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy
        (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
        ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy
           (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (! assoc
          (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
             (sym_mon_braiding 
                ((C,, M),, B) x y)
             (identity z))
          (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                       ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
               monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x
               ⊗_{ M} z ⟧,
         i
         · (mon_lassociator y x z
            · y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
              sym_mon_braiding 
                ((C,, M),, B) x z))
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
           M z
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
        (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator
           ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
         maponpaths
           (λ i : C
                  ⟦ y
                    ⊗_{ M} 
                    monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
                  y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
              (sym_mon_braiding 
                 ((C,, M),, B) x y)
              (identity z)
            · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
           (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
              M y
              (sym_mon_braiding 
                 ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
        (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
         c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
           (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
         dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})))
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
q:= p_hex x y z xx yy zz: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
id_disp yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} c x z xx zz
qq: transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
   (dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
    yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
     ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C
            ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
            y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
      monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
   c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})
qq':= transportb_transpose_right qq: c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM} id_disp zz ;; 
(dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
 yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
        (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
        (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
           y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
qq'': transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (assoc
     (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
      ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
     (y
      ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding 
                   ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
   yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz) =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
          (identity z)) 
       (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
   maponpaths
     (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z
            ⟧,
      i
      · (mon_lassociator y x z
         · y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                       ((C,, M),, B) x z))
     (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M
        z (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator 
        ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C
               ⟦ y
                 ⊗_{ M} 
                 monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
               y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
         monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z) · 
         mon_lassociator y x z · i)
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
           M y
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
      c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
        (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
      dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))
qq''':= transportb_transpose_right qq'': c x y xx yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{r} zz ;; 
dα^{ DM }_{ yy, xx, zz} ;; 
yy ⊗⊗^{ DM}_{l} c x z xx zz =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z 
        (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy
        (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
        ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                     ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy
           (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (! assoc
          (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
             (sym_mon_braiding 
                ((C,, M),, B) x y)
             (identity z))
          (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                       ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
               monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x
               ⊗_{ M} z ⟧,
         i
         · (mon_lassociator y x z
            · y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} 
              sym_mon_braiding 
                ((C,, M),, B) x z))
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering
           M z
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp
           ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
        (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator
           ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
         maponpaths
           (λ i : C
                  ⟦ y
                    ⊗_{ M} 
                    monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
                  y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
              (sym_mon_braiding 
                 ((C,, M),, B) x y)
              (identity z)
            · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
           (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering
              M y
              (sym_mon_braiding 
                 ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
        (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; 
         c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx 
           (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
         dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})))
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
        ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (! assoc
          (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
             (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
             (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x
                        z) @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
               monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z ⟧,
         i
         · (mon_lassociator y x z
            · y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                           ((C,, M),, B) x z))
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
        (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y
           z @
         maponpaths
           (λ i : C
                  ⟦ y
                    ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
                  y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
              (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
           (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
        (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
                                      xx
                                      (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
         dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! assoc
       (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
        ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
       (y
        ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
        (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (! assoc
          (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
             (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
             (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x
                        z) @
      maponpaths
        (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
               monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z ⟧,
         i
         · (mon_lassociator y x z
            · y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                           ((C,, M),, B) x z))
        (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
        (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y
           z @
         maponpaths
           (λ i : C
                  ⟦ y
                    ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
                  y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
            monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
              (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
           (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
        (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z)
                                      xx
                                      (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
         dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                             (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; dα^{ DM
                                                 }_{ yy,
                                                 zz,
                                                 xx} =
transportb
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
        (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (! assoc
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
           ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x
                        z))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
        (! assoc
             (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
                (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
                (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
             (y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                           ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
         maponpaths
           (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
                  monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z
                  ⟧,
            i
            · (mon_lassociator y x z
               · y
                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                              ((C,, M),, B) x z))
           (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
              (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
           (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B)
              x y z @
            maponpaths
              (λ i : C
                     ⟦ y
                       ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x
                                z,
                     y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
               monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
                 (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
                 (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z
               · i)
              (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
                 y
                 (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
           (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x
                                         (y ⊗_{ M} z)
                                         xx
                                         (yy
                                          ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
            dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                             (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; dα^{ DM
                                                 }_{ yy,
                                                 zz,
                                                 xx} =
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
     (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  (! (pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp
        (pr1 DM (x ⊗_{ M} y) z (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) zz)
        (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
     (! (! assoc
             (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
              ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
             (y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                           ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
           (pr1 DM y (z ⊗_{ M} x) yy (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
        (! assoc
             (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
                (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
                (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
             (y
              ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                           ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
         maponpaths
           (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
                  monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z
                  ⟧,
            i
            · (mon_lassociator y x z
               · y
                 ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding
                              ((C,, M),, B) x z))
           (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z
              (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)))
        (transportf
           (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
              (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
           (sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B)
              x y z @
            maponpaths
              (λ i : C
                     ⟦ y
                       ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x
                                z,
                     y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
               monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
                 (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
                 (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z
               · i)
              (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M
                 y
                 (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z)))
           (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x
                                         (y ⊗_{ M} z)
                                         xx
                                         (yy
                                          ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
            dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}))))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                             (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; dα^{ DM
                                                 }_{ yy,
                                                 zz,
                                                 xx} =
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
    maponpaths
      (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
             y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
       monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
         (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
      (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
         (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z))) @
   (! assoc
        (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
        (y
         ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
    maponpaths
      (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
             monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z ⟧,
       i
       · (mon_lassociator y x z
          · y
            ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
                         x z))
      (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z
         (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y))) @
   ! (! assoc
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
           ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x
                        z)) @
   ! (pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx})

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
transportf
  (mor_disp ((xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz)
     (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} (zz ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx)))
  ((sym_mon_hexagon_lassociator ((C,, M),, B) x y z @
    maponpaths
      (λ i : C ⟦ y ⊗_{ M} monoidal_cat_tensor_pt x z,
             y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧,
       monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
         (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
         (identity z) · mon_lassociator y x z · i)
      (when_bifunctor_becomes_leftwhiskering M y
         (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z))) @
   (! assoc
        (monoidal_cat_tensor_mor
           (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y)
           (identity z)) (mon_lassociator y x z)
        (y
         ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x z) @
    maponpaths
      (λ i : C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z,
             monoidal_cat_tensor_pt y x ⊗_{ M} z ⟧,
       i
       · (mon_lassociator y x z
          · y
            ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B)
                         x z))
      (when_bifunctor_becomes_rightwhiskering M z
         (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y))) @
   ! (! assoc
          (sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x y
           ⊗^{ M}_{r} z) (mon_lassociator y x z)
          (y
           ⊗^{ M}_{l} sym_mon_braiding ((C,, M),, B) x
                        z)) @
   ! (pr122 (monoidal_braiding_laws B)) x y z)
  (dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                                (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; 
   dα^{ DM }_{ yy, zz, xx}) =
dα^{ DM }_{ xx, yy, zz} ;; c x (y ⊗_{ M} z) xx
                             (yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} zz) ;; dα^{ DM
                                                 }_{ yy,
                                                 zz,
                                                 xx}

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
x, y, z: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
isaset
  (C ⟦ (x ⊗_{ M} y) ⊗_{ M} z, y ⊗_{ M} (z ⊗_{ M} x) ⟧)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
disp_braiding_law_hexagon2 DM c

 exact (make_disp_symm_braiding_hex1 p_hex).

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
c: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_inv: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv c
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat c
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex c
disp_braiding_laws DM c c

    exact (make_disp_symm_braiding_laws p_inv p_nat p_hex).
  Defined.

End DisplayedSymmetric.

Section Projection.

  Context
    {C : category}
    {D : disp_cat C}
    {M : monoidal C}
    {DM : disp_monoidal D M}
    {B : symmetric M}
    (DB : disp_symmetric DM B).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric DM B
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor (total_symmetric DM DB)
  B (projection_fmonoidal DM)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric DM B
is_symmetric_monoidal_functor (total_symmetric DM DB)
  B (projection_fmonoidal DM)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_symmetric DM B
x, y: total_category D
B (pr1_category D x) (pr1_category D y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (projection_fmonoidal DM) y x =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (projection_fmonoidal DM) x y
· (# (pr1_category D))%cat (total_symmetric DM DB x y)

    exact (id_right _ @ ! id_left _).
  Qed.

End Projection.

Section LocallyPropositional.

  Context
    {C : category}
    {D : disp_cat C}
    {M : monoidal C}
    (DM : disp_monoidal D M).

  Context (LP : locally_propositional D).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_laws DM DB DBinv

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_laws DM DB DBinv

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_iso DM DB DBinv
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply LP.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_iso DM DB DBinv
 split ; apply LP.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply LP.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding DM B

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding DM B

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: braiding M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
DBinv: disp_braiding_data DM
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)
disp_braiding_laws DM ?Goal ?Goal0

    exact (make_disp_laws_braiding_locally_propositional DB DBinv).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M

disp_braiding_laws DM DB DB

M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M

B: symmetric M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply LP.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B

 split ; apply LP.

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
 split ; intro ; intros ; apply LP.
  Qed.

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_symmetric DM B

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
LP: locally_propositional D
B: symmetric M
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_braiding_laws DM ?Goal ?Goal

    exact (make_disp_laws_symmetric_locally_propositional DB).
  Defined.

End LocallyPropositional.

Section InvertibleMorphismsBraiding.

  Context
    {C : category}
    {D : disp_cat C}
    {M : monoidal C}
    (DM : disp_monoidal D M)
    (B : braiding M).

  Context (LG : groupoidal_disp_cat D).
  Context (DB : disp_braiding_data DM (monoidal_braiding_data B)).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (B y x)
     (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
      monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (DB y x yy xx)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (B y x)
     (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
      monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (DB y x yy xx)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
l:= LG (y ⊗_{ M} x) (x ⊗_{ M} y) (B y x)
  (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
   monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x): ∏ (xx : D (y ⊗_{ M} x)) (yy : D (x ⊗_{ M} y))
(ff : xx -->[ B y x] yy),
Isos.is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (B y x)
     (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
      monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x)) ff
is_z_iso_disp
  (make_z_iso' (B y x)
     (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
      monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (DB y x yy xx)

    exact (l _ _ (DB _ _ yy xx)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_braiding_data DM (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
disp_braiding_data DM (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy -->[
monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y] yy ⊗⊗_{ DM} xx

    exact (pr1 (DB_obj_inv xx yy)).
  Defined.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_laws DM DB DBinv

DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_laws DM DB DBinv

DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB

disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB

D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M

LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
 exact p_nat.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_iso DM DB DBinv
 split ; apply DB_obj_inv.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
 exact p_hex.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M

DB: disp_braiding_data DM B

p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB

M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M

C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: braiding M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_braiding_law_naturality DM DB
p_hex: disp_braiding_law_hexagon DM DB
disp_braiding_laws DM ?Goal ?Goal0

    exact (make_disp_laws_braiding_locally_groupoidal p_nat p_hex).
  Qed.

End InvertibleMorphismsBraiding.

Section InvertibleMorphismsSymmetric.

  Context
    {C : category}
    {D : disp_cat C}
    {M : monoidal C}
    (DM : disp_monoidal D M)
    (B : symmetric M).

  Context (LG : groupoidal_disp_cat D).
  Context (DB : disp_braiding_data DM (monoidal_braiding_data B)).

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv DM DB

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv DM DB

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportf
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx) =
id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
pr1 (DB_obj_inv DM B LG DB xx yy) ;; DB y x yy xx
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (B y x)
        (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
         monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x)))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
pr1 (DB_obj_inv DM B LG DB xx yy) ;; DB y x yy xx
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) =
pr1 (DB_obj_inv DM B LG DB xx yy) ;; DB y x yy xx

      exact (! pr12 (DB_obj_inv _ B LG DB xx yy)).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso' (B y x)
        (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
         monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x)))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
  (make_z_iso' (B y x)
     (monoidal_braiding_data_inv B x y,,
      monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x)) =
pr1 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B x y)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_symmetric DM B

disp_symmetric DM B

DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =

  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))

disp_braiding_data DM B

D: disp_cat C

DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M

DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv DM ?c
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM ?c
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM ?c

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_braiding_data DM B
 exact DB.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_inv DM DB
 exact (make_disp_laws_symmetric_locally_groupoidal p_nat p_hex p_sym).
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
 exact p_nat.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
M: monoidal C
DM: disp_monoidal D M
B: symmetric M
LG: groupoidal_disp_cat D
DB: disp_braiding_data DM B
p_nat: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_nat DM DB
p_hex: disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
p_sym: ∏ (x y : C) (xx : D x) (yy : D y),
DB x y xx yy ;; DB y x yy xx =
transportb
  (mor_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy) (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
  (pr2 (monoidal_braiding_inverses B y x))
  (id_disp (xx ⊗⊗_{ DM} yy))
disp_sym_moncat_laws_tensored_hex DM DB
 exact p_hex.
  Defined.

End InvertibleMorphismsSymmetric.
